name: Godox V860II TTL Li-Ion Flash For Fujifilm

features.Key Features: Built-In 2.4GHz X Wireless Radio System | Compatible with Fuji i-TTL | Guide Number: 197' at ISO 100 and 200mm | Zoom Range: 20-200mm (14mm with Panel) | Tilts from -7 to 90 | Rotates Left & Right 180 | Wireless Master/Slave TTL Functionality | Recycle Time: 1.5 Seconds at Full Power | High-Speed, 1st and 2nd Curtain Sync | Runs on Rechargeable Li-Ion Battery Pack
